name: Schedule recurring task
description: Schedule the agent to run a prompt on a cron schedule. Use when the user asks 'every Monday at 9am', 'daily', 'weekly summary', etc. Returns the job id and next run time.

cron.description: Standard 5-field cron expression (min hour dom month dow). Example: '0 9 * * 1' = every Monday at 9am. Sub-minute schedules are rejected.

prompt.description: What the agent should do when this fires. Keep it self-contained; no chat context.

thinking.description: Thinking level for each run. Default medium.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'America/Mexico_City'). Defaults to server timezone.
